biofunc.VCF¶

class biofunc.vcf.VCF(path: str, compressed: bool = False)¶
property FILTER: dict[str, dict] | None¶

Filters that have been applied to the data Returned in format :

{

“ID”: { “Description”: “desc” }, “ID2”: { “Description”: “desc” }, …

}

property FORMAT: dict[str, dict] | None¶

Genotype field specifications Returned in format :

{
“ID”{

“Number”: “number”, “Type”: “type”, “Description”: “desc” },

“ID2”{

“Number”: “number”, “Type”: “type”, “Description”: “desc” },

}

property PEDIGREE: dict | None¶

Relationships Between genoomes

property SAMPLE¶

Sample Genotype Mappings

property assembly: str | None¶

URL field that specifies location of a fasta file containing breakpoint assemblies referenced in the VCF records for structural variants via the BKPTID INFO key.

property contig: dict[str, dict] | None¶

Description of contigs referred to in the VCF file

property fileformat¶

VCF format version number

property len¶

number of variants within the VCF file

property pedigreeDB: str | None¶

Link to database of relationships between genomes

split(chunks=2) → tuple¶

Returns list of generators starting at different positions within the VCF file For easier use with multiprocessing

class biofunc.vcf.Record(line: list)¶
property FORMAT¶

Only parse FORMAT field on request

property GT_fields: None | dict¶

Only parse GT fields on request

property INFO: dict[str, list[str]]¶

Only parse INFO on request
